extensionDescription.message: Understand legislation clearly, in any language, without political bias.
extensionDescription.description: Short description shown in the Chrome Web Store.

popupIdle.message: Navigate to a legislation page to analyse it.
popupIdle.description: Shown when the current tab is not a recognised legislation page.

popupLoading.description: Shown while the scoring API call is in progress.

resultScoreLeft.description: Left end of the score bar axis label.

resultScoreCenter.description: Center of the score bar axis label.

resultScoreRight.description: Right end of the score bar axis label.

resultConfidenceLabel.description: Confidence percentage label. $1 is substituted with the integer value.

methodologyLinkText.description: Clickable text for the methodology disclaimer link.

errorNetwork.description: Shown on network timeout or connection failure.

errorUnsupported.description: Shown when the jurisdiction or content type is not supported.

errorUnavailable.description: Shown on API 5xx or unexpected failure.
